creator: jamie@catflap.org
text:
'Really'?

Presumably a problem with the old send-pr command:

Jul 19 02:29:34 dyslexicfish sendmail[4572]: s6J1TY8r004572: to=mk@oxeo.com,FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org, ctladdr=jamie (1000/1000), delay=00:00:00, xdelay=00:00:00, mailer=relay, pri=62529, relay=[127.0.0.1] [127.0.0.1], dsn=2.0.0, stat=Sent (s6J1TY0N004573 Message accepted for delivery)
Jul 19 02:29:44 dyslexicfish sm-mta[4575]: s6J1TY0N004573: to=<mk@oxeo.com>, ctladdr=<jamie@dyslexicfish.net> (1000/1000), delay=00:00:10, xdelay=00:00:01, mailer=esmtp, pri=62784, relay=mail.oxeo.com. [66.230.174.68], dsn=2.0.0, stat=Sent (Ok: queued as 7D49629B04C)
